taxExemption.title: Tax exemption
taxExemption.description: The employee pays no ISR or TSS (AFP/SFS). Custom deductions still apply.
taxExemption.reasonPlaceholder: Why is this employee exempt from taxes?

suite.title: Spectra Suite
suite.subtitle: Select a module to get started
suite.comingSoonText: This module is under development. Coming soon.

settings.title: Suite Settings
settings.managedNotice: Company settings are managed at the Suite level.
settings.moduleVisibilityDesc: Show or hide modules across the whole Suite. Hidden modules disappear from the launcher and dashboard for everyone. Only the super admin can change this.

nav.noPermission: You don't have permission for this.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your last payroll period
dashboard.noPayrollData: No payroll data yet. Process your first payroll to see the dashboard.

employees.title: Employees
employees.subtitle: Employee list synced from BambooHR

payrollStatus.noPermission: You don't have permission to change payroll status

employees.noEmployees: No employees found. Sync from BambooHR to get started.

reports.title: Employee Reports
reports.subtitle: Export employee data in CSV or PDF format
reports.directoryDesc: Name, email, department, job title, hire date, status
reports.compensationDesc: Name, job title, department, pay rate, pay type

vacation.title: Vacation Info
vacation.notConfigured: Vacation rules not yet configured for {{country}}.
vacation.notConnected: Connect BambooHR in Settings → Connectors to load vacations.
vacation.fetchError: Could not load vacations from BambooHR.

payroll.title: Process Payroll
payroll.subtitle: Calculate and process payroll for your employees
payroll.unknownCountryWarning: {{count}} employees have no country set in BambooHR — Dominican Republic rules will be used.
payroll.noActiveEmployees: No active employees found. Sync from BambooHR first.
payroll.noHourlyForCountry: No hourly employees found for this country. {{count}} salaried employee(s) shown below for reference.
payroll.hubstaffNotConnected: Hubstaff not connected — hours will start at 0 for manual entry.

review.title: Review Hours
review.subtitle: Review and adjust hours before calculating payroll
review.noHours: No hours data found for this period
review.vacationTooltip: On vacation {{period}} · Vacation pay of {{amount}} is generated separately
review.pendingVacationIsr: Pending vacation ISR: {{amount}} (will be collected this period)
review.salariedNote: These employees have a fixed salary and are not included in hourly payroll calculations.
review.unmappedBanner: {{count}} employee(s) have no Hubstaff mapping — their hours will be 0.
review.includeTooltip: Unchecking marks the employee inactive for all future payroll until reactivated

calculate.title: Payroll Calculation
calculate.salariedError: Cannot calculate — the following employees are salaried and cannot be processed in hourly payroll:
calculate.salariedErrorNote: Go back and remove salaried employees from the hours list.
calculate.quincena1Notice: 1st Fortnight — ISR is calculated but NOT retained this period. It will be charged together with the 2nd fortnight ISR.
calculate.quincena2Notice: 2nd Fortnight — ISR for both fortnights (1st + 2nd) will be retained in this period.
calculate.genericCountryNotice: Tax rules not configured for {{country}}. Only gross pay will be calculated — no statutory deductions applied.

approve.title: Approve Payroll
approve.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to approve this payroll? This will generate pay stubs and allow sending to employees.

soloPaystub.title: Pay Stub Preview
soloPaystub.isrSalary: Salary for the month applicable to ISR
soloPaystub.noEmail: This employee has no email address

history.title: Payroll History
history.subtitle: View and manage past payroll periods
history.reopenConfirm: Reopen this payroll to edit it? You can adjust hours, recalculate and re-approve the same run. This action is recorded in the audit log.

connectors.title: Connectors
connectors.subtitle: Manage your integrations with external services

bamboohr.title: BambooHR
bamboohr.subdomainHelp: The subdomain of your BambooHR account (e.g. yourcompany.bamboohr.com)
bamboohr.apiKeyHelp: Generate an API key in BambooHR under My Info → API Keys

hubstaff.title: Hubstaff
hubstaff.refreshTokenPlaceholder: Paste your Personal Access Token here
hubstaff.refreshTokenHelp: Generate a Personal Access Token at developer.hubstaff.com → Personal access tokens. Paste the full token here.
hubstaff.tokenExpired: Your Hubstaff token expired. Generate a new one at developer.hubstaff.com
hubstaff.mappingSubtitle: Link Hubstaff users to BambooHR employees
hubstaff.noNamesNote: Hubstaff did not return user names for this organization. Use the User ID (shown as "User #ID") to identify members from your Hubstaff admin panel, then select the matching employee on the right.
hubstaff.allMapped: All hourly employees are mapped to a Hubstaff user.
hubstaff.fuzzyDone: Suggested {{count}} match(es) based on name similarity
hubstaff.fuzzyNoNames: No Hubstaff user names available for fuzzy matching

email.title: Email
email.description: Configure email delivery for pay stubs

countryTaxes.title: Country Taxes
countryTaxes.subtitle: Define each country's employee deductions and income tax. (DR is configured under Fiscal Parameters.)
countryTaxes.disclaimer: Reference values (2025–2026). Verify before a live run; ceilings and brackets are editable.
countryTaxes.deductionsHint: Toggle each deduction on/off. Rate is % of the base; or use a flat per-period amount. Cap = max base per period (blank = no cap).
countryTaxes.name: Name
countryTaxes.incomeTaxHint: Annual brackets (same engine as the DR DGII scale).

holidays.title: Public Holidays
holidays.subtitle: Auto-synced from Nager.Date · Editable
holidays.info: ✦ Auto holidays come from Nager.Date and refresh on every sync. ✎ Manual holidays you add are never overwritten by a sync.
holidays.none: No holidays for this country and year yet. Sync from the API or add one manually.
holidays.duplicate: A holiday already exists on that date.

vacations.title: Vacation Rules
vacations.subtitle: Seniority tiers and pay formula per country · Editable
vacations.notConfiguredText: Vacation rules for {{country}} have not been configured yet.
vacations.formulaLine1: Average Monthly Salary = (Hourly Rate × Hours/week × Weeks/year) ÷ Months/year
vacations.formulaLine2: Daily Salary = Average Monthly Salary ÷ Daily divisor
vacations.formulaLine3: Vacation Pay = Daily Salary × Vacation Days

company.title: Company Settings
company.subtitle: Configure your company information for pay stubs and branding
company.name: Company Name
company.logoHelp: PNG or JPG, max 2MB. Displayed on pay stubs and app header.
company.accentColorHelp: Used for branding in pay stubs

payroll.title: Payroll Settings
payroll.otRateHelp: Additional percentage over base rate (e.g., 35 means 1.35× base rate)
payroll.holidayRateHelp: Additional percentage over base rate (e.g., 100 means 2.0× base rate)
payroll.nightStartHelp: Night shift runs from this time until 07:00. Default 9:00 PM.
payroll.mixedThresholdHelp: When met, the 15% incentive applies to ALL the day's hours; otherwise only to the night hours.
payroll.mixedPercent: More than 50% of hours are nocturnal
payroll.mixedHours: More than X hours are nocturnal

fiscal.title: Fiscal Parameters
fiscal.subtitle: Dominican Republic tax parameters. Update when DGII or TSS resolutions change.
fiscal.minCotizableSalaryHelp: Current minimum cotizable salary per resolution. Used for TSS caps.
fiscal.dailyDivisorHelp: Used to calculate daily salary from monthly (default: 23.83 per Código Laboral RD)

emailTemplate.title: Email Template
emailTemplate.subtitle: Customize the email sent with pay stubs
emailTemplate.subject: Subject
emailTemplate.variablesList: {name} — Employee full name, {period} — Pay period, {company} — Company name
emailTemplate.payStubLanguageHelp: Language for PDF pay stubs (employees may prefer Spanish even if UI is in English)

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Session and access controls
security.shortWarning: Very short timeout may cause frequent logouts

errors.noHoursData: No hours data found for this employee in the selected period

login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your workspace

login.brandSub: Streamline HR, payroll, billing, and operations — all in one place, built for global teams.

accessDenied.title: Access Denied
accessDenied.message: You don't have permission to access this module. Contact your administrator.
accessDenied.noModules: You don't have access to any modules yet.

sessionWarning.title: Session Expiring Soon
sessionWarning.message: You'll be logged out in {{time}} due to inactivity. Click 'Stay Logged In' to continue.

templates.title: Templates
templates.subtitle: Reusable document content with auto-filled variables.
templates.empty: No templates yet. Create one to get started.
templates.emptyNoPermission: No templates yet. You need edit access to create one.
templates.restoreHint: Re-apply the latest built-in template versions (your own templates are kept)
templates.restoreConfirm: Re-apply the built-in templates? This overwrites edits to the built-in ones; your own templates are kept.
templates.deleteConfirm: Delete the template "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
templates.missingFields: Name, title and body are required.
templates.editorHint: Write the content and insert {{variables}} that fill per employee.
templates.name: Name
templates.bodyPlaceholder: Write the document text. Use the variables below to auto-fill employee data.
templates.insertVariable: Insert a variable (fills from employee/company data):
templates.signaturesHint: Optional. Caption under each signature line; leave blank for a single-signer letter. Supports {{variables}}.
templates.signatureRightPlaceholder:
Right — e.g. RESLINE DORCENT
LA EMPRESA

generate.title: Generate documents
generate.subtitle: Pick a template and one or more employees; data auto-fills from HR.
generate.noTemplates: No templates yet. Create one in
generate.search: Search by name, email or position…
generate.previewPickEmployee: Select an employee to preview the filled document.
generate.noHrNote: BambooHR is not connected, so fields like national ID and address will be blank. Configure it in
generate.noHrData: No employee HR data yet (national ID, address…). Run a sync in
generate.cedulaHint: If BambooHR doesn't provide it, type it here — it's saved and fills the document.
generate.noPermission: You need edit access to generate documents.

history.title: Generated documents

clients.deleteConfirm: Delete client "{{name}}"? This also removes its rates and assignments. Invoices are kept.

assign.title: Assigned employees

invoices.noHoursFor: No finalized hours in this period for: {{names}}.

invoices.emptyHint: Generate an invoice from a finalized payroll run.
invoices.pdfFailed: Could not generate the invoice PDF.

bonus.label: Label

restricted.reportsHint: Financial reports expose revenue and pay. You need Billing admin permission to view them.
